Executes a function to blink at intervals and prints a completion message.

# Purpose
This code is a simple script that repeatedly calls a function named `blink` every 1000 milliseconds (1 second) using the `setInterval` function. The `blink` function is not defined within this script, so it must be defined elsewhere in the application. After setting up the interval, the script prints a message to the console indicating that the file `main.js` has finished executing. This script provides narrow functionality, focusing on setting up a periodic task and logging a message.
